chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1998 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on CMA 7831/25 2.For orders on o/objections. 3.For orders on CMA 7832/25 4.For hearing of main case 02-12-2025 Mr. Arif Ali Lashari, Advocate for petitioner. **** 1. Urgency is granted. 2to4. Admittedly, the petitioner is a civil servant and by means of this constitutional petition has challenged the order passed by the competent authority against him, which through instant petition is barred under Article 212 of the Constitution. Result thereof, instant petition, being not maintainable, is hereby dismissed along with listed application(s). However, petitioner is at liberty to avail the remedy before the competent Court/forum, available under the law, if he desires so. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
